chapter_title.ar: باب سَلِّ الْمَيِّتِ وَ مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ دُخُولِ الْقَبْرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 64 – Placing the deceased and what is said during entering the grave

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/99)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/99)
text: إِذَا وَضَعْتَ الْمَيِّتَ فِي لَحْدِهِ قَرَأْتَ آيَةَ الْكُرْسِيِّ وَ اضْرِبْ يَدَكَ عَلَى مَنْكِبِهِ الْأَيْمَنِ ثُمَّ قُلْ يَا فُلَانُ قُلْ رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبّاً وَ بِالْإِسْلَامِ دِيناً وَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) نَبِيّاً وَ بِعَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) إِمَاماً وَ سَمِّ إِمَامَ زَمَانِهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz, from Zurara,

‘Heasws said: ‘When you place the deceased in his chasm (Lahad), recite Ayat Al Kursy (Chapter 2:255), and strike your hand upon his right shoulder, then say, ‘O so and so! Say, ‘I am pleased with Allahazwj as Lordazwj, and with Al Islam as Religion, and with Muhammadsaww as Prophetsaww, and with Aliasws as Imamasws’, and name the Imamasws of his time’.
en.sarwar: 7. It is a narration from him (narrator of previous Hadith) by his father from Hammad from Hariz from Zurarah who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, that when you place a deceased in his grave, read Ayatu al-Kursiy and hold his right shoulder with your hand, then say, ‘O so and so say, “I accept Allah as the Lord, al-Islam as the religion, Muhammad as the prophet and Ali as the Imam.” Then mention the Imam of his time.’””
